narrative:
Precinct Good Hope (precinct in Hocking County) has 887 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.2 percentage points.
